arts.ttl: Big Jose Mourinho claim made as Everton sack Sean Dyche just hours before FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Everton have confirmed the sacking of manager Sean Dyche just hours before their match against Peterborough. The decision came after they were beaten 1-0 by Bournemouth this past weekend as their poor season continued which sees them sitting 16th in the table, just one point clear of the relegation zone. arts.sum: Fenerbahce have publically backed Jose Mourinho and called out criticism from commentator Ertem Şener as the Portuguese manager continues to be linked with Everton. The Turkish club posted on their account on X today with a ‘mandatory disclosure’ in which they called out Ertem Şener’s recent comments on Mourinho. arts.ttl: Mourinho ruled out of running for Everton job
arts.sum: Jose Mourinho has been ruled out of the running to replace Sean Dyche as Everton manager. Everton announced the decision to sack Dyche on Thursday with the club just a point above the relegation places.
